The '''''Starcrossed''''' was a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Luxury Cruiser 200]] operated by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Heedon]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was refurbished by Heedon to resemble a bird, but much of the interior was left undone due to the fact that, due to Imperial oppression, not many could afford passage onboard the ship.

The ''Starcrossed'' was involved in [[Sayer Mon Neela]]'s bold attack on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Imperial Hazard]]'' during the [[Evacuation of Horob]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|The Capture of Imperial Hazard|The Capture of ''Imperial Hazard''|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
